_comment: Seed input for the registrations table (the runtime source of truth is tool-db). Copy to registration.json, fill client_id + deployment_id AFTER registering this tool in Moodle, then load it: `docker compose exec auth php bin/seed.php`. Split-horizon URLs: auth_login_url is browser-facing (https://localhost); key_set_url and auth_token_url are fetched by the tool container over the internal Docker network (http://moodle:8080).
